nasb.text: “But now those younger than I mock me, Whose fathers I disdained to put with the dogs of my flock.

esv.text: “But now they laugh at me, men who are younger than I, whose fathers I would have disdained to set with the dogs of my flock.

cnv.text: “但現在年紀比我小的人都笑我； 我不容許他們的父親與我羊群的犬隻為伴。

ccb.text: “但如今，比我年少的人竟嘲笑我， 他们的父亲曾被我鄙视， 连我的牧羊犬都不如。
